nodes.body: { 🕹️ Game Jam Releases } _Vadeum_ released [Quantum Superhacker](https://vadeum.itch.io/quantum-superhacker) for the Adroit Game Jam and won third place! "You invented QuantumOS. Now hack the world and make it a better place."
{ 🧑‍💻 Dev Updates } _Jesse Chounard_ is working on an [SDF font renderer](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nlkaaLeFgLY)
{ 🧑‍💻 Dev Updates } _Kelsey Watkins_ made a [stained glass window](https://bsky.app/profile/neitherworld.bsky.social/post/3mglsgvm7fs2i) in UE5
{ 🧑‍💻 Dev Updates } _Hutchkey Games'_ Enter The Depths now has [Steam Achievements](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0O9x-WoOiIw)!
{ 🧑‍💻 Dev Updates } _Tim Hely_ has been working on a haxelib to make it [easy to add navigation](https://axolstudio.github.io/flixel-ux/) to any HaxeFlixel game
{ 🎮 Game Releases } _chisatonishikigi479_ released a prototype for their game, [So Close Yet So Far](https://chisatonishikigi479.itch.io/so-close-yet-so-far), a Hell-themed endless runner game
{ 🧑‍💻 Dev Updates } _Butterscotch Shenanigans_ talk about the Steam Next Fest's [impact on sales](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aTEbSoqbkBU) on their podcast
{📆 Events} _Nic Weber_, Co-Founder & CPO of Noise, is giving a talk on [How To Go Viral](https://luma.com/doiao58u) at 6:30pm, Thursday April 16th at their office in City Foundry.
{📆 Events} The Maryville Senior Showcase will be held on April 10th 5:30pm - 8:30pm at Maryville University.

{📆 Events} _Matt Raithel_ (of Graphite Lab) and _James C. Kane_ will be speaking about [Indie Game Dev in the Age of AI](https://www.eventbrite.com/e/immersiv-interactive-media-design-stl-techweek-2026-tickets-1985608977904) as part of STL Tech Week on April 16 at 1pm.
{ 🎨 Visual Art } _J-Dudd_ made a [Custom Character (Riku) for Fraymakers](https://youtu.be/WdwAauOoFW4)
{ 🎨 Visual Art } _Xain Russel_ continues to crank out awesome character art like this [fanart for Slightly Damned](https://bsky.app/profile/xainrussell.bsky.social/post/3mgzz3xv76k2s)

{ 🎨 Visual Art } _DoodleDupe_ submitted a rattlesnake-themed boss character to the [Mega Man X: Reminiscence fan game art challenge](https://bsky.app/profile/doodledupe.bsky.social/post/3mh46gaa5y224).
{ 🧑‍💻 Dev Updates } _Tony Wojnar_ has been working on a new [Crayon Canyon](https://bsky.app/profile/tonywojnar.bsky.social/post/3mi4y5qkcns26) level for Dribble 2!

{ 🧑‍💻 Dev Updates } [Butterscotch Shenanigans](https://bsky.app/profile/bscotch.net/post/3mhvlchpmv224) and [Colorgrave](https://bsky.app/profile/looloopaa.bsky.social/post/3mhxo46kck22f) were both at **Pax East** in March showing off their games!

{ 🧑‍💻 Dev Updates } _Goofy Gourd_ has been adding [a dialogue system and art assets](https://bsky.app/profile/goofygourds.bsky.social/post/3mhz4fgxjy22l) (and many other things) to their new RPG game.
{ 🧑‍💻 Dev Updates } _Chelsea Catz_ has a wip demo for her new game [Splice Kitchen](https://chelseaz6.itch.io/splice-kitchen)!

{ 🎼 Music Releases } _Laz Richardson_ made [Crepuscula Town](https://lazarusrichardson.bandcamp.com/track/crepuscula-town), which took 3rd place in the [Brainless Music Jam](https://itch.io/jam/brainless-music-jam)!

events.title: April GameDev Social!
events.description:
Chat with fellow creators about making, playing, and admiring games! Talk about your game ideas and get inspired! Make friends and find collaborators. Our monthly hangout is open to EVERYONE. This is an all ages event, but minors must be accompanied by a parent or guardian.
 
For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see: https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/312692351
events.location: Dirty 20 Bar - 14051 Manchester Rd - Ballwin, MO, us

events.title: Dev Day Out: Hike at Castlewood!
events.description:
Let's get outside and touch grass! Join us for a hike around Castlewood State Park. We can get inspired and brainstorm game ideas while we move and take in the sights and sounds of nature along the Meramec river.
 
For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see: https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/313935893
events.location: Castlewood State Park - 1401 Kriefer Creek rd,  - Ballwin, MO, US

events.title: Game Club: Turnip Boy Commits Tax Evasion
events.description:
Game Club is like a book club except we pick a game to play each month and then meet up to discuss it with a focus on game design. This month's game is ... Turnip Boy Commits Tax Evasion!

For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see: https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/313935700

events.title: Game Audio Club
events.description:
If you’re into making video game music or sound design (or just curious) come hang out with us once a month! Doesn’t matter if you’re a pro or just starting out— everyone’s welcome. Just bring your love for game audio.
We’re a chill group where you can share your work, get feedback, or just vibe with people who love game audio. 
 
For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see: https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/314100367

events.title: Spring Game Jam Theme Reveal
events.description:
Join STLGameDev in challenging yourself to make a game over a week! It can be a board game or a video game, it's up to you! The Theme Reveal will be streamed online on Twitch.

For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see: https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/314039471

events.title: Gamedev Work Night
events.description:
St. Louis County Library Clark Family branch is hosting casual work time for local game developers in the Creative Lab. Bring your project to work on and talk with other devs for feedback or fun. This is open to EVERYONE ages 14 and up. 
 
For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see: https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/313609823
events.location: St. Louis County Library - Clark Family branch - 1640 South Lindbergh Blvd - St. Louis, MO, us

events.title: Spring Game Jam Showcase
events.description:
Join us in-person for a showcase of submitted Spring Game Jam demos at the St. Louis County Grand Glaize Library, Meeting Room 1.
 
For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see: https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/314039471
events.location: St. Louis County Library–Grand Glaize Branch, 1010 Meramec Station Road, Manchester, MO 63021, USA
